governingBody: Montana corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Montana prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: Crime, Drug Use.
note: The Montana prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: Crime, Drug Use and Violence
